description: aiXplain is an SDK to build and deploy autonomous AI agents on production-grade infrastructure, instantly.
GraphJS is a JavaScript client-side library to help developers easily enable social features on their web sites.
Grou.ps v2 is a micro-social-networking platform generator for online social groups.
Isomorphic is a boilerplate Webpack bundler to create isomorphic JavaScript web applications on Node, using React.
Codenames is a word-based party game, an online adaptation of the original game designed by Vlaada Chvátil.
